primary_blocker: Property renovation required — real barrier but may also be avoidance pattern
key_intelligence: Status-quo-resistant pattern: renovation is the stated barrier. Key question: is this a real timeline or avoidance? Push for firm renovation completion date + target go-live date. If renovation keeps slipping, this is an avoidance lead. If timeline is firm, set an offer to land on the day renovation completes.
top_objections: Property needs renovation work before going live
Not ready to commit until renovation is done
what_resonated: Clear STL income projection once property is ready
Stayful can schedule photography at point of completion
lead_language: I just need to finish the renovation first
